title: Lampard's Coventry return to Prem after 25 years
summary: Coventry City has secured promotion to the Premier League for the first time in 25 years after drawing with Blackburn. This marks a significant achievement for a club that has spent decades in lower divisions. The return to the top flight is a major milestone after years of instability and financial difficulties.
content: Coventry City will return to the Premier League for the first time in 25 years after securing their promotion from the Championship with a draw at Blackburn.

zh.title: 兰帕德的考文垂25年后重返英超
zh.summary: 考文垂城队在与布莱克本握手后，时隔25年首次获得英超升级资格。这对于多年来一直在低级别联赛中征战的俱乐部来说是一个重大成就。经过多年的不稳定和财务困难，重返顶级联赛是一个重要的里程碑。

title: Most NWSL players oppose potential calendar flip
summary: The National Women's Soccer League Players Association indicates that most players oppose changing the league's calendar from spring-fall to fall-spring. This opposition could impact potential league restructuring plans. Player preferences are crucial in major league scheduling decisions.
content: The National Women's Soccer League Players Association says that a majority of players are currently opposed to a potential switch of the league's calendar to a fall-spring season.

zh.title: 大多数美国职业女子足球联赛球员反对可能的赛历变更
zh.summary: 美国职业女子足球联赛球员协会表示，大多数球员反对将联赛赛历从春秋制改为秋春制。这种反对可能会影响联赛潜在的重组计划。球员偏好在重大联赛赛程决定中至关重要。

title: Griezmann's last dance: An Emotional Copa final
summary: Antoine Griezmann is preparing for what could be his final weeks with Atlético Madrid, culminating in an emotional Copa del Rey final against former club Real Sociedad. The match holds special significance as Griezmann faces his old team during a poignant transition in his career. The Copa final will be a bittersweet moment marking the end of an era.
content: Antoine Griezmann said he is soaking up an emotional week ahead of the Copa del Rey final against his former club, Real Sociedad, as he enters his final weeks with Atlético Madrid.

zh.title: 格里兹曼的最后一舞：一场充满情感的国王杯决赛
zh.summary: 安托万·格里兹曼正在准备他在马德里竞技队的最后几周，最后会迎来与前东家皇家社会的一场情感满满的国王杯决赛。当格里兹曼在职业生涯的一个重要转折点面对他的老东家时，这场比赛具有特殊的意义。国王杯决赛将是一个苦乐参半的时刻，标志着一个时代的结束。

title: Saudi Arabia fire coach 2 months before WCup
summary: Saudi Arabia has dismissed head coach Herve Renard just weeks before the World Cup, creating uncertainty in their preparation. The firing comes at a critical time with the tournament approaching rapidly. This managerial change could impact the team's form and readiness for international competition.
content: Saudi Arabia fired head coach Herve Renard on Friday, less than two months before the World Cup.

zh.title: 沙特阿拉伯在世界杯前两个月解雇主教练
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯在世界杯前数周解雇了主教练埃里韦·雷纳德，在球队的备战工作中造成了不确定性。这一解雇发生在比赛即将到来的关键时刻。这一教练变动可能会影响球队的状态和国际比赛的准备情况。

title: Retired stars Bird, Rapinoe announce separation
summary: Sue Bird and Megan Rapinoe, two celebrated retired athletes, announced they have ended their decade-long relationship. The separation of the high-profile couple marks a significant moment in sports and LGBTQ+ visibility. Both athletes have been influential figures beyond their respective sports careers.
content: Retired sports stars Sue Bird and Megan Rapinoe announced Friday on social media that, after a decade together, they are no longer in a relationship.

zh.title: 退役明星伯德和拉皮诺宣布分手
zh.summary: 著名退役运动员苏·伯德和梅根·拉皮诺宣布结束了十年的感情关系。这对备受瞩目夫妇的分手在体育和LGBTQ+可见度方面标志着一个重要时刻。两位运动员在各自的体育职业生涯之外都产生了广泛影响。

title: Man Utd facing defensive crisis for Chelsea clash
summary: Manchester United faces a severe defensive shortage ahead of their match against Chelsea, with only one fit senior centre-back available. The injury crisis could significantly impact their competitive chances in the fixture. Defensive stability is crucial against a strong opponent like Chelsea.
content: Manchester United are facing a defensive crisis ahead of their trip to Chelsea with only one fit senior centre-back in their travelling squad.

zh.title: 曼联在切尔西对阵中面临防线危机
zh.summary: 曼联在与切尔西的比赛前面临严重的防线短缺，只有一名健康的资深中后卫可用。伤病危机可能会严重影响他们在这场比赛中的竞争力。防线稳定性对于对阵切尔西这样的强队至关重要。

title: Coventry promotion special and unique - Lampard
summary: Frank Lampard, Coventry City's manager, hails the club's return to the Premier League after 25 years as a "unique" and special achievement. The promotion represents an extraordinary turnaround for a club that faced years of struggle and instability. Lampard's leadership has been central to this remarkable recovery.
content: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard calls his side's promotion back to the Premier League after 25 years away a "unique" achievement.

zh.title: 考文垂升级特殊且独特 - 兰帕德
zh.summary: 考文垂城队经理弗兰克·兰帕德称该俱乐部在25年后重返英超联赛是一个"独特"的特殊成就。这次升级代表了一个不平凡的转变，对于一个经历多年困境和不稳定的俱乐部来说。兰帕德的领导力对这一非凡的复兴至关重要。

title: Carrick leaves door open for Rashford return
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick indicates that Marcus Rashford's future at the club remains undecided while he completes a season-long loan at Barcelona. The possibility of Rashford's return presents Manchester United with important squad planning decisions. His status will likely be resolved in the coming months.
content: Michael Carrick says there has been no decision made on the Manchester United future of Marcus Rashford, who has spent the season on loan at Barcelona.

zh.title: 卡里克为拉什福德回归留下了大门敞开
zh.summary: 曼联经理迈克尔·卡里克表示，在拉什福德在巴塞罗那完成为期一个赛季的租借期间，他在俱乐部的未来仍未确定。拉什福德回归的可能性为曼联提出了重要的阵容规划决定。他的身份可能会在未来几个月内得到解决。

title: The rollercoaster race for second spot - who's going up with Coventry?
summary: With two weeks remaining in the Championship season, four clubs—Ipswich Town, Millwall, Southampton, and Middlesbrough—are competing fiercely for the second promotion spot alongside Coventry City. The race remains intensely competitive with multiple teams capable of securing promotion. The final matches will determine which team joins Coventry in the Premier League.
content: With two weeks of the regular season left, Ipswich Town, Millwall, Southampton and Middlesbrough are chasing Premier League football.

zh.title: 第二名的跌宕起伏竞争 - 谁将与考文垂一起升级？
zh.summary: 在英超冠军联赛赛季还剩两周的情况下，四支俱乐部——伊普斯维奇镇、米尔沃尔、南安普顿和米德尔斯堡——正在激烈竞争与考文垂城一起争夺第二个升级席位。这场竞争仍然非常激烈，多支球队都有机会获得升级。最后的比赛将决定哪支球队与考文垂一起进入英超联赛。

title: How Coventry earned Premier League return after 25 years
summary: Frank Lampard has successfully guided Coventry City back to the Premier League after 25 years of absence marked by groundshares and financial administration. The achievement represents a complete turnaround for a club that faced existential challenges in recent years. Lampard's managerial expertise was instrumental in the promotion.
content: After a quarter of a century out of the Premier League, groundshares and administration, Frank Lampard has led Coventry City back to the top flight.

zh.title: 考文垂如何在25年后重返英超联赛
zh.summary: 弗兰克·兰帕德成功地将考文垂城足球俱乐部带回英超联赛，该俱乐部已缺席25年，期间经历了球场共享和财务困境。这一成就代表了一家面临生存挑战俱乐部的完全转变。兰帕德的管理专长对升级至关重要。

title: Liverpool to rival Man Utd for Wharton - Saturday's gossip
summary: Liverpool are set to join Manchester United in competing for Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton, while Tottenham have agreed to sign Bournemouth's Marcos Senesi. Newcastle are reportedly willing to sell Yoane Wissa as the transfer window generates significant activity. Multiple top clubs are pursuing high-profile talent from established Premier League sides.
content: Liverpool are set to compete with Manchester United for Crystal Palace's Adam Wharton, Tottenham have agreement to sign Bournemouth's Marcos Senesi, Newcastle United are prepared to sell Yoane Wissa, plus more.

zh.title: 利物浦与曼联竞争沃顿 - 周六足坛传闻
zh.summary: 利物浦准备加入曼联的行列，争夺水晶宫中场球员亚当·沃顿，托特纳姆已同意签下伯恩茅斯的马科斯·塞内西。据报道，纽卡斯尔愿意出售约翰·维萨，转会期产生了大量活动。多家顶级俱乐部正从老牌英超球队追逐高调人才。

title: Chelsea midfielder Palmer denies Man Utd links
summary: Chelsea midfielder Cole Palmer has denied speculation linking him with a move to Manchester United, stating he has "no plans" to leave. Palmer's statement provides clarity on his future amid ongoing transfer rumors. The midfielder's commitment to Chelsea appears firm despite competitive interest from rivals.
content: Chelsea midfielder Cole Palmer says he has "no plans" to leave the club amid links to Manchester United.

zh.title: 切尔西中场帕默否认曼联传闻
zh.summary: 切尔西中场球员科尔·帕默否认了关于他转会曼联的猜测，声称他"没有计划"离开。帕默的声明在持续的转会传闻中澄清了他的未来。尽管受到竞争对手关注，这名中场球员对切尔西的承诺似乎坚定。

title: NI need to evolve and enhance in Malta - McArdle
summary: Northern Ireland coach Michael McArdle believes his team must "evolve and enhance" their playing approach for a World Cup qualifier against Malta. The match represents an important opportunity in their qualification campaign. McArdle is emphasizing the need for tactical development and improvement.
content: Michael McArdle says his Northern Ireland side have to "evolve and enhance" their game in Saturday's World Cup qualifier in Malta.

zh.title: 北爱尔兰需要在马耳他进化和提升 - 麦卡德尔
zh.summary: 北爱尔兰教练迈克尔·麦卡德尔认为他的球队必须"进化和提升"他们的比赛方式，以应对对阵马耳他的世界杯预选赛。这场比赛代表了他们资格赛中的一个重要机会。麦卡德尔强调了战术发展和改进的必要性。

title: USMNT needs ambitious post-World Cup succession plan
summary: U.S. Soccer faces questions about its coaching stability with Mauricio Pochettino, raising concerns about the federation's ability to attract elite managers for future leadership. The issue highlights the need for a strategic long-term succession plan to maintain competitive standards.
content: Mauricio Pochettino won't coach the USMNT forever, and when he does leave, will U.S. Soccer be able to bring in another big-name boss to replace him?

zh.title: USMNT需要制定雄心勃勃的世界杯后继任计划
zh.summary: 美国足协因毛里西奥·波切蒂诺的执教稳定性面临质疑，引发人们对该协会吸引精英经理人从事未来领导工作能力的担忧。这凸显了制定战略性长期继任计划以保持竞争力的必要性。

title: NJ Transit confirms $150 train fares for WC fans
summary: New Jersey Transit has confirmed train fares of $150 for fans attending World Cup matches, adding significant transportation costs on top of already expensive match tickets. The steep prices have drawn criticism from supporters facing overall high expenses for attending games.
content: Sky-high ticket prices won't be the only thing emptying the wallets of soccer fans attending World Cup matches at some U.S. venues this spring.

zh.title: 新泽西交通局确认世界杯球迷列车票价为150美元
zh.summary: 新泽西交通局确认了参加世界杯比赛球迷的列车票价为150美元，这在本已昂贵的比赛门票基础上增加了大量交通成本。这些高票价引发了面临参赛总体高消费的球迷的批评。

title: Guardiola: Title 'is over' if Arsenal beat Man City
summary: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has declared the Premier League title race will be decided in Sunday's crucial match against Arsenal, suggesting a loss would be insurmountable. The statement underscores the high stakes and competitive intensity of the title race.
content: Pep Guardiola has said the title race will be "over" if Manchester City lose to Arsenal this weekend.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉：若阿森纳击败曼城，冠军就"结束"了
zh.summary: 曼城主教练佩普·瓜迪奥拉宣布英超冠军争夺赛将在周日与阿森纳的关键比赛中决出，暗示失败将是无法逆转的。这一声明强调了冠军争夺赛的高风险和竞争激烈程度。

title: Arteta: Arsenal will play to win at City, Saka out
summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has committed to an attacking approach in the title-deciding match against Manchester City, though the team will be without forward Bukayo Saka. The statement reflects Arsenal's determination to pursue the championship despite losing a key attacking player.
content: Mikel Arteta has vowed Arsenal will play to win in Sunday's Premier League title showdown at Manchester City.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔：阿森纳将在曼城比赛中全力争胜，萨卡缺阵
zh.summary: 阿森纳主帅米克尔·阿尔特塔承诺在与曼彻斯特城的决定性冠军争夺战中采取进攻战术，尽管球队将缺少前锋布卡约·萨卡。这一声明反映了阿森纳尽管失去关键进攻球员，仍决心追求冠军的决心。

title: Ex-USWNT star Long signs with Fort Lauderdale
summary: Allie Long, a decorated former USWNT player and World Cup champion, has signed with Fort Lauderdale United FC for the remainder of the 2025-26 season. Her signing marks a historic moment as the first World Cup champion to join the newly established USL Super League.
content: Former United States women's national team player Allie Long has signed with Fort Lauderdale United FC for the rest of the 2025-26 USL Super League season, becoming the first World Cup champion to sign with a team in the league.

zh.title: 前美国女足国家队球星朗签约劳德代尔堡
zh.summary: 装饰有勋章的前美国女足国家队球员、世界杯冠军艾莉·朗与劳德代尔堡联队签约，将效力至2025-26赛季结束。她的签约标志着一个历史性时刻，成为第一位加入新成立USL超级联赛的世界杯冠军。

title: Man United's Carrick 'disappointed' with ref calls
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick has expressed frustration with refereeing decisions that have resulted in suspensions for key defenders Harry Maguire and Lisandro Martínez. The contentious calls have weakened United's defensive lineup at a critical point in the season.
content: Michael Carrick has been "massively disappointed" with some refereeing decisions that have left Manchester United without Harry Maguire and Lisandro Martínez.

zh.title: 曼联卡里克对裁判判罚"失望"
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队主帅迈克尔·卡里克对导致关键后卫哈里·马奎尔和李桑德罗·马丁内斯禁赛的裁判判罚表示沮丧。这些有争议的判罚在赛季的关键时刻削弱了曼联的防线。

title: How rivals Falkirk & Dunfermline have turned around fortunes
summary: Bitter rivals Falkirk and Dunfermline will meet in the Scottish Cup semi-final at Hampden, marking a remarkable turnaround for both clubs. Both teams have experienced extraordinary rises in their respective fortunes recently. The semi-final between these historic rivals will be highly significant for Scottish football.
content: When bitter rivals Falkirk and Dunfermline walk out at Hampden for Saturday's Scottish Cup semi-final it will mark an extraordinary rise for both clubs.

zh.title: 对手法尔柯克和敦弗姆林如何扭转局势
zh.summary: 宿敌法尔柯克和敦弗姆林将在汉普顿参加苏格兰足球杯半决赛，标志着两支俱乐部的非凡转变。两支球队最近都经历了各自的非凡上升。这两支历史悠久的对手之间的半决赛对苏格兰足球将具有重大意义。

title: Scotland carry no burden in chase for World Cup spot
summary: Scotland women's coach Melissa Andreatta insists her squad feels no pressure from previous tournament misses as they pursue a World Cup place in Brazil. The team has built what Andreatta describes as a "perfect storm" in their qualification quest. Their approach emphasizes confidence and momentum rather than historical underperformance.
content: Scotland head coach Melissa Andreatta insists the squad do not feel burdened by missing out on previous major finals and have created a "perfect storm" in their quest to reach next year's World Cup in Brazil.

zh.title: 苏格兰在追逐世界杯名额时没有压力
zh.summary: 苏格兰女性教练梅丽莎·安德雷塔坚持她的球队在追求巴西世界杯席位时，不会因为以前的比赛失利而感到压力。该队在资格赛中建立了安德雷塔所说的"完美风暴"。他们的方法强调信心和动力，而不是历史表现。

title: Fans feel 'gouged' by £111 World Cup train tickets
summary: The Football Supporters' Association has criticized the high cost of train tickets to World Cup matches in New Jersey, with fares reaching £111 per journey. The pricing has sparked backlash from supporters who argue they are being unfairly charged for transportation to the games.
content: The Football Supporters' Association says fans are being "fleeced" and "gouged" by the high cost of train tickets to World Cup games in New Jersey.

zh.title: 球迷对£111世界杯列车票感到"被宰"
zh.summary: 足球支持者协会批评了新泽西州世界杯比赛列车票的高成本，票价达到£111每趟。这种定价引发了支持者的强烈反对，他们认为自己在前往比赛的交通费用上被不公平地收费。

title: One of Arsenal's greatest unsung heroes - Keown's tribute to Manninger
summary: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown has paid tribute to goalkeeper Alex Manninger, who has died at age 48. Keown highlighted Manninger's often-overlooked contributions to Arsenal's success during their playing days together.
content: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown pays tribute to his old friend and former Gunners team-mate Alex Manninger, who has died at the age of 48.

zh.title: 阿森纳最伟大的无名英雄之一——基翁对曼宁的致敬
zh.summary: 阿森纳前后卫马丁·基翁为已故门将亚历克斯·曼宁致敬，曼宁于48岁去世。基翁强调了曼宁在他们一起效力期间对阿森纳成功所做的常被忽视的贡献。

title: Football is a game of opinions - so why did the SFA ban BBC's Michael Stewart?
summary: The Scottish Football Association has banned BBC broadcaster Michael Stewart from Hampden Park due to his criticism of refereeing standards in Scottish football. The ban raises questions about free speech and the treatment of media critics by sports governing bodies.
content: His outspoken views on the standard of refereeing in Scotland have resulted in the SFA saying he is no longer welcome at Hampden.

zh.title: 足球是意见之争——那么苏格兰足协为什么禁止英国广播公司的迈克尔·斯图尔特呢？
zh.summary: 苏格兰足球协会因迈克尔·斯图尔特对苏格兰足球裁判标准的批评，禁止他进入汉普顿公园球场。这项禁令引发了关于言论自由和体育管制机构对待媒体批评者待遇的问题。

title: Bournemouth close to appointing Rose
summary: Bournemouth is nearing the appointment of Marco Rose as their new head coach, succeeding Andoni Iraola. The managerial change comes as the club seeks to strengthen its leadership for future seasons.
content: Bournemouth are close to appointing Marco Rose as Andoni Iraola's replacement as head coach.

zh.title: 伯恩茅斯接近任命罗斯为主教练
zh.summary: 伯恩茅斯即将任命马可·罗斯为新主教练，接替安东尼·伊拉奥拉。这一教练变动是俱乐部为加强未来几个赛季领导力而做出的举措。

title: What to watch for in Premier League title showdown
summary: Sunday's Premier League match between Arsenal and Manchester City is expected to be the decisive contest in determining the league champion. The fixture will determine which team maintains title contention and who faces elimination from the race.
content: Arsenal's visit to Man City on Sunday will likely decide who wins the league.

zh.title: 英超争冠大战应该关注什么
zh.summary: 周日阿森纳与曼城的英超比赛预计将成为决定英超冠军归属的关键对决。这场比赛将决定哪支球队维持争冠希望，哪支球队面临被淘汰的命运。

title: Motherwell & Hearts dominate PFA Scotland Team of the Year
summary: Motherwell and Hearts have dominated the PFA Scotland Premiership Team of the Year selections, with five and four players respectively. The selections reflect both teams' strong performances, with Hearts' prominence consistent with their position atop the Scottish Premiership.
content: There are five Motherwell players in the PFA Scotland Premiership Team of the Year, with four from table-topping Hearts.

zh.title: 莫瑟韦尔和哈茨主导苏超PFA年度最佳阵容
zh.summary: 莫瑟韦尔和哈茨在苏超PFA年度最佳阵容评选中占据主导地位，分别有5名和4名球员入选。这一结果反映了两支球队的出色表现，哈茨的突出表现与其在苏超联赛中的领跑位置相一致。

title: Arteta lights training ground fire to inspire players
summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has used unconventional motivation tactics, lighting a fire at the team's training ground to inspire players ahead of a critical week. The dramatic gesture underscores the high pressure and emotional intensity surrounding the upcoming title-deciding matches.
content: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta lights a fire at their London Colney training ground to motivate players before crucial week.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔点燃训练场火焰激励球员
zh.summary: 阿森纳主帅米克尔·阿尔特塔采用了非常规的激励战术，在球队训练场点燃了一把火来激励球员应对关键的一周。这一戏剧性举动强调了围绕即将到来的决定性冠军比赛的高压力和情感强度。

title: Ramsgate cite lack of spending in Martin dismissal
summary: Non-league club Ramsgate has dismissed manager Lee Martin, partially blaming insufficient spending on player recruitment. The dismissal highlights financial constraints and management expectations within lower-division football.
content: Lee Martin is sacked as manager by non-league Ramsgate, with the club citing an underspend on player recruitment as part of the reason for his departure.

zh.title: 拉姆斯盖特因支出不足解雇马丁

title: Celtic 'not good enough' for O'Neill to dream of cup glory

summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery previewed a Europa League semifinal against Nottingham Forest after eliminating Bologna 7-1 on aggregate. Emery described the all-English matchup as "special."
content: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery is looking forward to a "special" Europa League semi-final with Nottingham Forest following a 7-1 aggregate win over Bologna.

zh.title: 埃梅里期待维拉与森林的"特殊"半决赛
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉主帅乌奈·埃梅里在球队7:1击败博洛尼亚后，预览了与诺丁汉森林队的欧联杯半决赛。埃梅里将这场全英对阵描述为"特殊"。
